```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">design principle 02</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.95em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">Define the negatives.</div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:0;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);text-align:left;">

  <div style="flex:1;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;padding:0.85em 1em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <span style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;border-radius:50%;background:#D45F47;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:900;">✕</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">vague</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;font-style:italic;">
    "code review for security"
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="flex:1.15;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;padding:0.85em 1em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <span style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;border-radius:50%;background:#2C8475;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:900;">✓</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#1F5E54;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">sharp</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;font-style:italic;">
    "security review — <strong style="color:#1F5E54;font-style:normal;">do NOT run on docs, refactors, formatting</strong>"
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-style:italic;">
  underused. steal it.
 </div>

</div>
```
